title: BEM-998 validator harness
objective:
Create file governance/validators/run_receipt_validators.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

from validate_telegram_production_receipt import validate_receipt as validate_telegram
from validate_live_runtime_receipt import validate_receipt as validate_runtime

CASES = [
    {
        "name": "telegram_mock_receipt",
        "validator": validate_telegram,
        "fixture": Path("governance/tests/fixtures/telegram_production_receipt_sample.json")
    },
    {
        "name": "live_runtime_mock_receipt",
        "validator": validate_runtime,
        "fixture": Path("governance/tests/fixtures/live_runtime_receipt_sample.json")
    }
]


def main():
    results = []
    for case in CASES:
        if not case["fixture"].exists():
            results.append({"name": case["name"], "ok": False, "errors": [{"code": "fixture_missing", "path": str(case["fixture"])}]})
            continue
        payload = json.loads(case["fixture"].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        result = case["validator"](payload)
        result["name"] = case["name"]
        result["fixture"] = str(case["fixture"])
        results.append(result)
    summary = {"ok": all(r["ok"] for r in results), "results": results}
    out = Path("governance/reports/BEM998_RECEIPT_VALIDATORS_HARNESS_RESULT.json")
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return 0 if summary["ok"] else 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
